org.apache.paimon.hive

Class HiveCatalogLock

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.hive.HiveCatalogLock
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Closeable, AutoCloseable, CatalogLock

    public class HiveCatalogLock
extends Object
implements CatalogLock
